title: Auto Chunky
description: A lightweight, server-side utility mod that automatically pauses world pre-generation when players are online and resumes when they leave.
body:
# Auto Chunky

A lightweight, server-side utility mod that automatically pauses world pre-generation when players are online and resumes when they leave. 

Perfect for servers using the [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) mod to pre-generate their worlds! You no longer have to worry about the server lagging when players join, or forgetting to resume Chunky when the server is empty.

## How it works
- **Player Joins:** The mod instantly pauses Chunky behind the scenes (`/chunky pause`).
- **Server Becomes Empty:** The mod starts a 2-minute timer. If no one joins during this time, it automatically resumes generation (`/chunky continue`).

## Commands
*Requires OP / Permission level 2*
- `/autochunky toggle` - Turns the automation ON or OFF.
- `/autochunky status` - Checks if the automation is currently running.

## Requirements & Recommended Setup
- **Server-side only!** Your players do NOT need to download this to join your server.
- **Fabric Loader:** Version **0.18.5 or higher** is strictly required.
- **[Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky)** must be installed on the server for this mod to have any effect.
- **Highly Recommended:** Set `continueOnRestart` to `true` in your Chunky configuration! This ensures Chunky starts generating immediately when the server boots up, allowing Auto Chunky to perfectly manage pausing and resuming from the very beginning.

## Permissions & Modpacks
You are totally free to use this mod in your modpacks! If you wish to copy, fork, or use the code in your own projects, you are welcome to do so, provided you give proper credit to the original author (Gabbe). Released under the MIT License.
